dialogos.texto_en: (After leaving Ocean Expo Park, we decided to\n stretch our legs and head straight to Kouri Island,\n at the request of the quintuplets.)
(This was decided thinking that\n changing our location would solve things.)
(They just had to see Kouri Island,\n also known as the 'Island of Love,'\n which is apparently a popular spot for couples.)
(They were looking forward to seeing\n the heart-shaped rock on the island's coast \n that's known as the 'Heart Rock'...)
(As expected of a popular spot like that,\n there were many tourists about.)
(We had to be careful as we moved around.\n However, it was like trying to bail out a sinking boat\n with a spoon.)
(In the end, the quintuplets ended up\n attracting attention, even on Kouri Island.\n It seems that our thinking was too naive.)
(If five people with the same face and wearing the\n same clothes gather together, it's probably inevitable\n they'd attract attention like this.)
(Repeating our strategy of running away before being\n noticed by tourists, the day suddenly became night...\n and we decided to give up on any further sightseeing.)
(Since I focused everything on avoiding attention,\n I couldn't gain anymore hints on how to see through \n their disguises, and returned to the hotel in despair%p-2;――%p;)
(And with that, the fourth day\n of our graduation trip came to an end.)
